args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cache_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
second_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness)
printf '%s' "$second_out" | grep -q 'executed=0'
printf '%s' "$second_out" | grep -q 'reused=2'
grep -q '"executed_artifact_count":0' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":2' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'reuse-decision\n'
